parameters.name: thresh
parameters.label: Threshold
parameters.description: Brightness level value adjusts where trace outline in image occurs.

parameters.name: addtexture
parameters.label: Add Point Texture
parameters.description: This option allows the generation of point texture coordinates (UVs). This may occasionally be necessary when the option is enabled.

parameters.name: delborder
parameters.label: Remove Borders
parameters.description: When enabled, this option eliminates extraneous data along the edges of the original image so it isn't traced. This is useful for when "dirty" edges exist in the original image that you don't want tra

parameters.name: bordwidth
parameters.label: Border Width
parameters.description: The number of pixels the removal border should be.

parameters.name: doresample
parameters.label: Resample Shapes
parameters.description: Determines level of refinement (number of points) for generating trace outlines.

parameters.name: step
parameters.label: Step Size
parameters.description: Value controlling trace outline refinement when is checked.

parameters.name: dosmooth
parameters.label: Smooth Shapes
parameters.description: When this option is checked, the geometry is filtered to remove sharp corners.

parameters.name: corner
parameters.label: Corner Delta
parameters.description: Value controlling corner smoothing when is checked.

parameters.name: fitcurve
parameters.label: Fit to Curves
parameters.description: If selected, the geometry at this point is converted to two-dimensional Bzier curves. Flat edges are preserved in polygons.

parameters.name: error
parameters.label: Fitting Error
parameters.description: Value controlling accuracy of the above curve fitting process. For best results, the input should retain as many points as possible, i.e. do not select or .

parameters.name: convpoly
parameters.label: Convert to Poly
parameters.description: This option will convert the above curves back into polygons.

parameters.name: lod
parameters.label: Level of Detail
parameters.description: This value controls the accuracy of the conversion back into polygons.

parameters.name: hole
parameters.label: Hole Faces
parameters.description: This will bridge all holes in the output so that they may be rendered properly. Bzier curves and polygons can be holed, but polygonal holing sometimes produces better results. You may want to use the
